spec_match.rationale: Perfect targeting of five distinct pseudo-classes (:playing, :paused, :seeking, :muted, :volume-locked) using pure CSS selectors.

interactive.rationale: Excellent interface mapping live playback states to colored diagnostic list panels. Features interactive HTML5 video controls and dynamic capability probe toggles.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Proves direct visual binding, replacing multiple legacy audio/video property event hooks with pure declarative CSS rules.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers volume locking conditions and difficult-to-trigger state definitions cleanly.

references.rationale: Includes a direct ChromeStatus entry reference link.

design_system.rationale: Beautiful alignment matching status indicators to flat border cards.

openQuestions.title: Replace broken video source
openQuestions.detail: The base64 encoded video source (data:video/mp4;base64,...) is truncated or invalid, causing immediate decode errors in Chrome. Replace this with a robust silent loop mp4 data uri or an open-source short media asset.

summary: The state-inspector is an outstanding real-time visualizer mapping active media pseudo-classes, though it would benefit from a valid video stream payload.
